name: Elbmesh Journal Event Stream Mixing
summary: Execution journal records are stored in or replayed from Resource Event streams, polluting deterministic Resource state.

rules: Keep Resource Events, Action Journal, Operation Journal, Reaction Journal, and execution traces separate.
checks: Resource replay reads Resource Event streams only.
Failure/retry/journal metadata is not appended as Resource Events unless it is explicitly a business fact.
antiPatterns: Store ActionRejected or ActionFailed as Resource Events by default.
Use trace gaps as domain facts.

blocks.markdown: Mixing execution journals with Resource Event streams makes replay non-domain-specific and can turn runtime failures or adapter observations into false Resource state.

blocks.description: Accepted separation between Events and execution journal records.
Trace gaps are diagnostics, not Resource Events.
